user.title: NeverDry — Sensors & Model
user.description: Select your weather sensors and configure the ET model parameters.

data_description.rain_sensor: Rain gauge or weather station precipitation sensor
data_description.rain_sensor_type: How your rain sensor reports precipitation. Event-based: mm per event (tipping bucket, recommended). Daily total: cumulative mm since midnight (weather station)
data_description.alpha: Evapotranspiration coefficient. Start with 0.22, adjust after observing your garden for a week
data_description.t_base: Temperature below which evapotranspiration is zero (plants dormant)
data_description.d_max: Upper limit for the deficit index
data_description.vwc_sensor: If set, deficit is calculated directly from soil moisture instead of the ET model

zone.title: Add irrigation zone
zone.description: Configure zone #{zone_count}. You can add more zones after this.

data.name: Zone name
data.kc: Custom crop coefficient Kc (overrides plant family)

data_description.name: Display name for this zone (e.g., Vegetable Garden, Lawn)
data_description.valve: The switch entity that controls this zone's irrigation valve. Leave empty for monitoring mode (no valve)
data_description.delivery_mode: How your valve delivers water. Estimated flow: simple on/off valve, duration calculated from flow rate. Flow meter: valve with a flow sensor, closes at target volume. Volume preset: smart valve that accepts a volume target and closes itself.
data_description.area_m2: Surface area of this irrigation zone in square meters
data_description.system_type: Type of irrigation system — sets default efficiency
data_description.efficiency: Leave empty to use the system type default. Set to override
data_description.plant_family: Select the type of plants in this zone. Sets a seasonal crop coefficient (Kc) that adjusts water demand throughout the year
data_description.kc: Leave empty to use the plant family seasonal profile. Set to override with a fixed Kc value (0.1–2.0)
data_description.flow_rate_lpm: Water flow rate of the valve in liters per minute. Required for estimated_flow mode. Measure with a bucket and stopwatch
data_description.flow_meter_sensor: Sensor entity that reports cumulative liters delivered. Required for flow_meter mode
data_description.volume_entity: Number entity on the smart valve that accepts a volume target in liters. Required for volume_preset mode
data_description.delivery_timeout: Maximum time to wait for flow_meter or volume_preset delivery before forcing valve close (safety limit)
data_description.threshold: Deficit level that triggers Mode A irrigation for this zone

error.zone_name_too_long: Zone name is too long (max 64 characters)
error.flow_rate_required: Flow rate is required for estimated_flow delivery mode
error.flow_meter_required: Flow meter sensor is required for flow_meter delivery mode
error.volume_entity_required: Volume entity is required for volume_preset delivery mode
error.zone_already_exists: A zone with this name already exists

model_params.title: ET Model Parameters
model_params.description: Adjust the evapotranspiration model. Changes take effect immediately.
